name: Chise Toudou
description: An exchange student from Japan. She is highly proficient in samurai-style swordsmanship. She often acts naive and has a hard time adapting to the culture differences. She is a spy for Japan tasked with observing the Commonwealth and Kingdom so that her superiors can determine which country to ally with.

name: Sonic the Hedgehog
nativeName: ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ
description: The titular main protagonist of the Sonic the Hedgehog series and SEGA's mascot. He is an anthropomorphic hedgehog known for his ability to run faster than the speed of sound, hence his name. As his species implies, Sonic can also roll up into a concussive ball, primarily to attack enemies. Born on Christmas Island, Sonic abandoned his home at an early age to pursue a life of adventures. He has spent most of his life traveling around the world and beyond, usually accompanied by his best friend,
searchTerms: ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ

name: Mio Fuyutsuki
description: __Height:__ 154 cm Fuyutsuki is a calm woman with a laid-back personality. She is Himuro's coworker and spends her daily life with him in the office. She is also always there for Himuro whenever he is facing some kind of trouble. Fuyutsuki has a black cat named Nyamerou.

name: Antarcticite
description: __Hardness:__ 3 Antarcticite is the gem assigned to winter duty while the others hibernate. Due to their crystal composition, Antarc "sleeps" in liquid form when it is above room-temperatures, and re-crystallizes when the temperature drops. The colder the temperature, the harder they become. Antarc is a perfectionist who acts like a soldier, marching and speaking with extreme formality. They are used to working alone, as all the other gems hibernate during the winter. Despite their usual cold at

name: Mitsuki Nase
description: __Height:__ 165 cm (5'5") Nase Mitsuki is the sadistic second daughter of the famous underworlder Nase household. She is with Akihito in order to observe him, but she is in fact very worried about him. She is good enough friends with Akihito to be able to speak frankly with him, and is the president of the school's literature club as a second-year student. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Senketsu
description: A living sailor uniform Ryūko finds beneath her house. Senketsu is a Kamui (神衣 lit. "God Clothes"), an outfit that provides its wearer with godlike abilities in exchange for their blood. He has the power to transform into an indestructible suit of armor, albeit with a skimpy appearance, much to Ryūko's embarrassment. name: Tartaglia
description: __Vision:__ Hydro __Constellation:__ Monoceros Caeli Tartaglia is the most recent, the Eleventh, of the Harbingers of the Fatui. Following danger wherever he goes, Childe is always eager for a challenge, making him extremely dangerous despite being the youngest member. name: Gouhin
description: A back alley psychiatrist who tries to rehabilitate carnivorous animals that crave meat. The wounds on his face were made by violent patients. Despite his gruff appearance and rough character, he's gentle and caring.

name: Hotaru Tomoe
description: With people who do not know or understand her well, Hotaru is extremely shy and socially awkward, due to her powers and intelligence, but only at first. With her close friends and family, she is a sweet, gentle, young woman with great warmth and spirit. She tends to be independent, having been alone and taking care of herself for quite some time. name: Lavi
description: __Height:__ 177cm (5'9") A cheerful Exorcist of mixed race, who aims to become a Bookman and is working along the Black Order just to be close to the events that must be seen. To help him, he developed an incredible memory: he is able to memorize every single aspect of something he saw. His anti-Akuma weapon is a size-shifting hammer, which he calls Ōzuchi Kozuchi or Nyoibo. It can grow or extend. name: Azaka Kokutou
description: **Height:** 160 cm Mikiya's younger sister, who she is in love with. She becomes an apprentice of Touko due to her rivalry with Shiki and is talented in the magic of ignition. description: __Height:__ 162 cm Race: Human In Princess Yona's group, he is the healer and genius. He is an outstanding curious intellectual. He can say mean things, but he's a caring pretty boy. He was born in a poor village of the Fire Tribe.

nativeName: カトレア・ボードレール
description: Cattleya Baudelaire is a character in the Violet Evergarden series. Being a figurehead Auto Memories Doll who works for the CH Postal Company, Cattleya never stops being requested and often takes on clients with love troubles. She works alongside Violet and has been close with Hodgins since before the company was established, joining as one of its initial employees.
